title: Extract v1.0-launch-story.md to docs/ + examples/ — three-act distribution
description: 将 1279 行 v1.0-launch-story.md 三幕脚本转化为公开访问的产品文档: 精简版 docs/launch-story.md, fab init 中文化 stdout 嵌入 getting-started.md Stage 2, examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/AGENTS.md 承接第二幕 300 行 werewolf 样例 (成为 E2E 夹具), docs/dashboard-tour.md 扩写第三幕 (标注 v1.1 专属). 前置: TASK-001 (roadmap 结构) + TASK-004 (getting-started 文档结构).

files.change: 精简版 v1.0-launch-story.md: 保留三幕结构, 裁剪至 200-300 行, 移除过度重复, 保留核心叙事弧和关键技术演示
在 Stage 2 'Initialize Fabric' 嵌入 fab init 的中文化 stdout 示例 (from launch story Act 1); 展示真实的 forensic evidence 输出
基于 launch story 第二幕 ~300 行 werewolf AGENTS.md 样例创建; 完整的 5-agent (村民/狼人/预言家/女巫/猎人) AGENTS.md; 可作为 E2E 测试夹具
简短说明: werewolf-minigame-stub 是演示 Fabric multi-agent 协作的最小可运行样例
扩写 launch story 第三幕 Dashboard 演示部分; 标注 'v1.1 专属' 标签; 截图占位符 + 功能说明; 覆盖 Ledger view / Rules view / Agents view

implementation: Read v1.0-launch-story.md lines 400-800 (Act 2: werewolf AGENTS.md ~300 lines)
Create docs/launch-story.md: condense to 200-300 lines keeping narrative arc — intro + Act 1 condensed + Act 2 condensed + Act 3 condensed + closing
Update docs/getting-started.md Stage 2: find Stage 2 section, insert fab init stdout example block from Act 1 (the forensic evidence discovery sequence)
Create examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/AGENTS.md: extract and finalize werewolf AGENTS.md from Act 2 — 5 agents with roles, responsibilities, communication protocols
Create docs/dashboard-tour.md: expand Act 3 content into structured tour; add [Screenshot: xxx] placeholders; add '> v1.1 Feature' callout boxes; cover 3 main views
Verify: launch-story.md line count <= 350; werewolf AGENTS.md has 5 agent definitions

reference.pattern: Three-act story extraction into product documentation
reference.examples: AGENTS.md structure: frontmatter + agent definitions + protocols + example interactions

criteria: docs/launch-story.md exists with line count between 150-400
docs/getting-started.md Stage 2 section contains a code block showing fab init stdout output
examples/werewolf-minigame-stub/AGENTS.md exists and contains >= 5 agent definitions
docs/dashboard-tour.md exists and contains 'v1.1' tag/callout in >= 1 location
docs/dashboard-tour.md covers >= 3 Dashboard view sections (Ledger, Rules, Agents)
convergence.definition_of_done: 1279 行脚本的核心价值以 4 个文档位置公开访问; werewolf AGENTS.md 可作为真实 E2E 夹具使用

rationale.chosen_approach: 三幕分发 — 每幕对应一个文档角色; 精简版 launch-story 保留叙事完整性
alternatives_considered: 直接 publish 原始 1279 行脚本
仅保留 examples/ 不建 launch-story.md
decision_factors: 原始脚本包含 v1.1 Dashboard 内容, 需标注区分
werewolf AGENTS.md 是 multi-agent 协作的最佳演示案例
getting-started 需要真实 stdout 示例增加可信度
rationale.tradeoffs: 精简版 launch-story.md 需要判断哪些内容可裁剪, 保留叙事弧的完整性

manual_checks: docs/getting-started.md Stage 2 has code block with fab init output

commit.message_template: docs(launch-story): three-act distribution to docs/ + examples/
